name: Angvik 2
short_description: Angvik 2 is an action roguelike platformer with a unique style. Explore a variety of character builds as you navigate randomized levels, offering new challenges and surprises with each adventure.
detailed_description:
Angvik 2 is an action roguelike platformer with a unique style. Explore a variety of character builds as you navigate randomized levels, offering new challenges and surprises with each adventure.

Choose from an array of species and class combinations as you battle through a world of unusual enemies. Arm yourself with a mix of gear, from mysterious rings and magical scrolls, to swords and guns.

Though death may end your journey, the gold you collect is carried back to your starting ship. Spend your earnings on optional side activities between adventures, whether it’s fishing, mining, gardening, or simply enjoying a meal.
about_the_game:

Though death may end your journey, the gold you collect is carried back to your starting ship. Spend your earnings on optional side activities between adventures, whether it’s fishing, mining, gardening, or simply enjoying a meal.
supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
